field_map.note: Selected identifier repetition.
Selected identifier repetition; identifier type is literal LOCAL-1-0.
Title case normalized; first and middle names concatenated.
YYYYMMDD to YYYY-MM-DD.
F and M retained; all other values become U.
Only P/H address repetitions; P becomes HOME; country defaults GB.
Numeric phone only; CP selects mobile; NET selects email component 4.
Deceased Y maps 1 otherwise 0; date becomes YYYY-MM-DD.
Truncated to 6 and 8 characters; GP defaults G9999998 when absent.
Language lowercased; one risk/AISFlag per PID-35 repetition.
Builds next-of-kin name, address, phone, mobile and email.

Uses attending doctor in secondary then primary component.
Derives Scheduled, Did Not Attend, transfer, departed, arrived, discharged, or attended status.
Direct mapping with default none.

evidence.claim: The channel performs patient, appointment, merge, and AISFlags flows under event-specific filters, rather than treating all ADT messages identically.

notes: MEH-specific AIS flow is explicit: PID-35 drives PASAPI V2 AISFlags, while AIS OUT retrieves flags and emits per-flag IAM/A60 messages to AIS Sender.
